title: Instant Leaf Decay
description: Instant Leaf Decay immediately removes all connected leaves when a tree's supporting logs are broken, eliminating waiting times and improving server performance.
body:
# ⚡ Instant Leaf Decay

**Blink and You'll Miss It.**

We get it. You have things to do. You have diamonds to mine, dragons to slay, and mega-bases to build. You don't have 5 minutes or even 5 seconds to wait for a tree to realize it's dead.

**Instant Leaf Decay** is the nuclear option for deforestation.

### 💨 Speed at the Speed of Light
Why settle for "fast" when you can have **instant**? This mod aggressively checks for unsupported leaves and deletes them the *moment* they lose their connection to a log.
*   **One chop, gone.** Break the bottom log of a small tree, and the canopy vanishes before the wood hits your inventory.
*   **Ludicrous Efficiency:** Harvesting apples and saplings has never been this fast.
*   **Lag Reduction:** By removing leaves instantly, the server doesn't have to keep ticking them. It’s a clean sweep.

### 🛡️ Crash & Lag Prevention (TNT Farm Proof)
Tired of other fast leaf decay mods crashing your game or causing massive lag spikes when you blow up tree farms with TNT? Instant Leaf Decay has been completely rewritten to feature a queue-based decay scheduler. By decaying up to 250 leaf blocks per tick, it completely eliminates stack overflow crashes and severe performance freezes under high-load deforestation, keeping your gameplay smooth and flawless.

### 🔌 Plug & Play Power
Just like its sibling, this mod is built for **Fabric 1.20.x, 1.21.x, 26.1, and 26.2** and designed to be lightweight.
*   **Server-Side Friendly:** Install it on your server, and your friends don't need to download a thing. They'll just wonder why your trees are so cooperative.
*   **Optimized Code:** Pure, simple logic. No bloat.

**Stop watching paint dry. Stop watching leaves decay.** Get **Instant Leaf Decay**.
